title: Time and Effort Reporting — Interactive Training Module
display_label: Time & Effort Reporting Interactive Module (Articulate Rise)
content: Articulate Rise interactive training module on Time and Effort Reporting at Morgan State University. Created by Ryan Mobley and originally delivered as a D-RED seminar on 2023-03-29. Explains the federal time and effort certification requirements for faculty, staff, and students working on sponsored projects, and walks through MSU's certification workflow. Self-paced. Companion Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/8il98s808gOhENp3hZuKGU16Wp96Rmc17-0wErnGLzobkGDV-2fVp0h5XV5bHaVc.uxOBdfs3BfngPxm6
